title: Customs Brokers
description: Prepare customs documentation and ensure that shipments meet all applicable laws to facilitate the import and export of goods. Determine and track duties and taxes payable and process payments on behalf of client. Sign documents under a power of attorney. Represent clients in meetings with customs officials and apply for duty refunds and tariff reclassifications. Coordinate transportation and storage of imported goods.

tasks.text: Prepare and process import and export documentation according to customs regulations, laws, or procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clear goods through customs and to their destinations for clients.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pay, or arrange for payment of, taxes and duties on shipments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Calculate duty and tariff payments owed on shipments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Request or compile necessary import documentation, such as customs invoices, certificates of origin, and cargo-control documents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Classify goods according to tariff coding system.
tasks.rationale: Software coding, programming, or application development task highly susceptible to automated generation.

tasks.text: Stay abreast of changes in import or export laws or regulations by reading current literature, attending meetings or conferences, or conferring with colleagues.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Sign documents on behalf of clients, using powers of attorney.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Advise customers on import and export restrictions, tariff systems, insurance requirements, quotas, or other customs-related matters.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Post bonds for the products being imported or assist clients in obtaining bonds.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Quote duty and tax rates on goods to be imported, based on federal tariffs and excise taxes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange for transportation, warehousing, or product distribution of imported or exported products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor or trace the location of goods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Confer with officials in various agencies to facilitate clearance of goods through customs and quarantine.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inform importers and exporters of steps to reduce duties and taxes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain line releases for frequent shippers of low-risk commodities, high-volume entries, or multiple-container loads.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide advice on transportation options, types of carriers, or shipping routes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Contract with freight forwarders for destination services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply for tariff concessions or for duty drawbacks and other refunds.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Insure cargo against loss, damage, or pilferage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare papers for shippers to appeal duty charges.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Suggest best methods of packaging or labeling products.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Maintain relationships with customs brokers in other ports to expedite clearing of cargo.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
